title: Calling Bulldog Drummond
writer: Howard Emmett Rogers, Gerard Fairlie, Arthur Wimperis
actors: Walter Pidgeon, Margaret Leighton, Robert Beatty
plot: A ruthless London gang prompts Scotland Yard to recruit retired Bulldog Drummond. He infiltrates the gang with detective Helen, gaining their trust until their true identities are exposed, leading to their capture by the gang over...
